overview: Anna University, Chennai (including its premier University Departments: CEG, MIT, ACT, and SAP), is a top-tier state technical university in India known for strong engineering education, research output, and consistent placement performance across core and IT sectors.
accreditation: NAAC A++ Grade (Cycle 3, CGPA 3.54/4.0, valid till 20 Aug 2030). NIRF 2024: 13th Engineering, 14th Overall (University).

‚āĻ20,000‚Äď‚āĻ35,000 per semester (Regular). Hostel and other charges extra.

admissions.admissionProcess: UG admissions via TNEA counseling using Class 12 marks. PG admissions through TANCET/GATE followed by TANCA counseling.
admissions.importantDates: Follows TNEA and TANCA counseling schedules annually.
